content:
download a iso in https://immortalwrt.kyarucloud.moe/releases/23.05.4/targets/x86/64/
add new hard disk image Wait for the image to be imported import a new Virtual Machine set vm params vi /etc/config/network set ipaddr to the address of the same network segment as the router and reboot after reboot , login immortalwrt in web browser by http://192.168.5.100 the default user is root, and the default password is password
summary:
1. download a iso in https://immortalwrt.kyarucloud.moe/releases/23.05.4/targets/x86/64/

  2. add new hard disk image

  3. Wait for the image to be imported

  4. import a new Virtual Machine

  1. set vm params

  1. vi /etc/config/network set ipaddr to the address of the same network segment as the router and reboot

  2. after reboot , login immortalwrt in web browser by http://192.168.5.100 the default user is root, and the default password is password
title: install-immortalwrt-in-Synology

content:
Hey, welcome to eatmoreduck’s Blog.
This is a personal blog with the tagline Code & Lifestyle & AI – coding, living, and tinkering with AI. That pretty much sums up what you will find here.
About Me I am eatmoreduck, a developer who enjoys tinkering with technology and tools. I spend most of my time writing code, occasionally messing around with NAS and smart home setups, and recently I have been hooked on using AI to boost productivity.
What This Blog Covers Content here revolves around a few topics:
Programming: Java backend, CI/CD, Git workflows, and other hands-on development experiences AI Tools: LLM applications, AI-assisted coding, and real-world reviews of productivity tools NAS & Smart Home: Synology setups, remote access solutions, and home networking Life Notes: Occasional thoughts and random musings The reason I started blogging is simple – document the pitfalls I have encountered and things I have learned. If it happens to help someone else along the way, even better.
Tech Stack Tools and frameworks powering this blog:
Static Site Generator: Hugo – fast builds, great developer experience Theme: PaperMod – clean and readable Editor: Obsidian – Markdown-based writing with local file management Hosting: Cloudflare Pages + GitHub Pages dual deployment Comments: Giscus – powered by GitHub Discussions Image Hosting: GitHub + jsDelivr CDN Get in Touch If you want to chat or have any suggestions, feel free to reach out:
Email: eatmoreduck@qq.com GitHub Issues: Open an issue on any of my repositories Thanks for visiting. Hope you find something useful here. For questions or suggestions, feel free to email eatmoreduck@qq.com.
summary:

title: About

Last updated: April 8, 2026
This Privacy Policy describes how eatmoreduck’s Blog (“this site”) collects, uses, and protects your personal information when you visit. Please read this policy carefully before using this site.
Information Collection This site is a static blog that does not require user registration or login, and does not actively collect personal identity information. However, the following information may be automatically recorded during your visit:
Access logs: Browser type, operating system, visit time, referring page, IP address, etc., automatically recorded by the server or third-party services Cookie data: Cookie information automatically sent by your browser to improve your browsing experience Cookie Usage This site uses cookies and similar technologies for the following purposes:
Website analytics: Google Analytics is used to collect anonymous access data to understand page visits and user behavior Third-party advertising: This site may display ads through Google AdSense. Google and its partners may use cookies to show personalized ads based on your past visits to this site and other websites You can manage or delete cookies through your browser settings. Please note that disabling cookies may affect some features of this site.
Google AdSense This site uses Google AdSense to display advertisements. Google AdSense may use cookies and web beacons to serve ads based on a user’s visits to this site and other websites on the internet.
Google uses cookies to serve ads based on a user’s prior visits to this website Users may opt out of personalized advertising by visiting Google Ads Settings Third-party ad vendors may use cookie-based tracking technologies to measure ad effectiveness For more information on how Google uses data, please see Google’s Privacy Policy Google Analytics This site uses Google Analytics to analyze website traffic and user behavior. Google Analytics collects anonymous data including page views, visit duration, and geographic location. This data is used solely to improve website content and user experience.
For details on Google Analytics data processing, please see the Google Analytics Privacy Policy.
Cloudflare This site uses Cloudflare for content delivery and security services. Cloudflare may collect access data for performance optimization and security protection. For details, please see the Cloudflare Privacy Policy.
Third-Party Links Articles on this site may contain links to third-party websites. This site is not responsible for the content or privacy practices of those websites. We recommend reading the privacy policies of each website you visit.
Data Protection This site takes reasonable technical measures to protect your information security, including HTTPS encrypted transmission and reliable third-party service providers.
Children’s Privacy The content of this site is intended for general tech enthusiasts and is not directed at children under 13. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children.
Policy Changes This privacy policy may be updated from time to time. Significant changes will be announced on this page. We recommend reviewing this page periodically for the latest policy.
Contact Us If you have any questions about this privacy policy, please contact us at:
Email: eatmoreduck@qq.com GitHub: eatmoreduck
